title: Croakma-keys
description: Croakma-keys replaces Froglights with different types of Chroma-key Colors so you can effectively make Green Screens in Minecraft!
body:
## Please be careful with how you use this pack, bright colors can cause a lot of eye strain and be potentially damaging to others if used incorrectly. Only use this pack for photo and video editing purposes.

## Croakma-keys
This resource pack is very simple, it only changes a one major thing- each Froglight color is replaced with different a chroma key color, which allows for both simple and complex photo and video editing. You can use this resource pack to make memes, video transitions, and more! It can easily be turned on or off when needed, and can be layered on top of any other resource pack without problems. "Verdant Froglights" are now Green Screens, "Pearlescent Froglights" are now Blue Screens, and "Ochre Froglights" are now Void Screens.

## List of changes
- New models for each froglight
- New textures for each froglight
- Blockstates removed for each froglight
- New sounds for froglights

**For updates you can follow me on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/8onfire.com)!** I'm the creator of #mcartday, as well as a Game Texture Artist, 3D Model Artist, 3D Animator, Gameplay Designer, and Content Creator in the Minecraft Space.

**Like this resource pack? You can donate me on [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/8onfire) to help support more projects like this!**
